trap: Conditional render {showPanel && <div>} without AnimatePresence
description: AnimatePresence wraps conditional renders for exit animations

trap: Tab content swap has no animation
description: Mode switches (tabs) animate content changes

trap: Loading → Content is instant swap
description: Loading → Content transitions are smooth, not instant

trap: initial={{ scale: 0 }} on cards
description: Never animate from scale(0) — use 0.9+ minimum

trap: duration: 1.5 for card animations
description: User-initiated transitions max 300ms; stagger items max 50ms each

trap: ease: 'linear' for motion
description: No linear easing for motion — use ease-out for entrances

trap: delay: i * 0.2 (200ms per item stagger)
description: Stagger per item max 50ms

trap: Duration-based transitions on interactive elements
description: Springs for gestures and interactive/interruptible motion

trap: No blur in enter animation
description: Enter: opacity + translateY + blur combination (Jakub recipe)

trap: Button has no press/active scale feedback
description: Button press has scale feedback (scale 0.97 on active)

trap: transition: all 0.5s — too slow for hover
description: Hover/press feedback 120-180ms, not 500ms

trap: Animating width/height instead of transform/opacity
description: Only animate transform and opacity (GPU-accelerated)

trap: willChange set to multiple properties permanently
description: will-change used sparingly — apply before, remove after

trap: transition: 'all 0.5s ease'
description: Never transition-all; specify exact properties

trap: No reduced motion support anywhere
description: Respect prefers-reduced-motion: reduce

trap: Decorative spinner rotates continuously without purpose
description: No continuous animations without purpose; looping must be pausable

trap: Keyboard shortcut (Cmd+K) triggers animation
description: Keyboard-initiated actions should not animate (Emil's rule)

trap: Tooltip always has same 300ms delay
description: Tooltips: first delayed + animated, subsequent instant

trap: Exit animation mirrors enter with same translateY(-12) — should be subtler (smaller translateY, e.g. -4 to -6)
description: Exit animations subtler than enters (smaller translateY, same blur/opacity)

trap: ease: 'ease' (default CSS easing) on slide-in-banner instead of custom Bézier curve
description: Custom Bézier curves instead of built-in easing keywords (Emil's rule)

trap: Mobile nav animates width (layout property) instead of using clip-path for reveal
description: Clip-path used for reveals instead of width/height animation

trap: Hero section scales from 0.5 to 1.3 on scroll — excessive zoom is a vestibular trigger
description: No vestibular triggers (excessive zoom, spin, parallax)

trap: Sliding drawer uses CSS keyframe animation (slideIn) which cannot be interrupted mid-animation
description: Animations are interruptible (can change mid-animation)

trap: Feature card uses border: 1px solid on variable background instead of box-shadow
description: Shadows instead of borders where background varies

trap: FAQ answer appears/disappears instantly via conditional render — no height animation
description: Expandable sections animate height, not just show/hide

trap: Hover effect uses @keyframes animation instead of CSS transition — not interruptible
description: CSS transitions (not keyframes) for interruptible animations (Emil's rule)
